faqs.question: Why are centipedes common in University Heights apartments?
faqs.answer: University Heights has many older buildings with basements, aging plumbing, and moisture-prone areas that attract centipedes. These pests seek damp, dark spaces and often enter through cracks in foundations, especially in pre-war structures common throughout the neighborhood.

faqs.question: Are centipedes dangerous to my family or pets?
faqs.answer: House centipedes are generally harmless but can deliver a painful bite if handled. They're more of a nuisance and indicator of moisture problems or other pest presence. Our treatments effectively eliminate centipedes while using products that are safe for your University Heights household when applied correctly.
